jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 99acres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
